problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: If Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry is applied to microcracks, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
